text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first image, with its pristine glass doors and minimalist design, suggests a space dedicated to knowledge or innovation—a laboratory of ideas perhaps. The second image draws me deeper into that world. The R+D wall speaks of exploration at the boundaries of human understanding and technology. The colors and interactive displays evoke a feeling of eager engagement, making me wonder how my own thoughts would evolve in such a fertile environment for discovery and reflection.
